revision.comment: [[瀧尾神社 (京都市)]] へのリダイレクトを解除しました
revision.text:
'''瀧尾神社'''、'''滝尾神社'''（たきのおじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。[[宗教法人]]としては全国に旧字体の瀧尾神社が13社、新字体の鷲宮社が4社、名称に瀧尾神社を含む神社が1社存在する。
* [[瀧尾神社 (八千代町)]] - 茨城県結城郡八千代町大字粟野鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市江曽島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市滝谷町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市平塚町鎮座。 * [[日光瀧尾神社]] - 栃木県鹿沼市口粟野鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市今市)]]（今市瀧尾神社） - 栃木県日光市今市鎮座。今市総鎮守。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)]] - 栃木県日光市川俣鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)]] - 栃木県日光市木和田島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)]] - 栃木県日光市倉ケ崎鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)]] - 栃木県日光市小佐越鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)]] - 栃木県日光市小林鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)]] - 栃木県日光市瀬尾鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)]] - 栃木県日光市土呂部鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)]] - 栃木県日光市森友鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)]] - 栃木県日光市山口鎮座。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市山内鎮座。[[日光二荒山神社]]の別宮。[[女峰山]]の鎮守。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市[[男体山]]八合目鎮座。日光二荒山神社の境内社で、上記の分祠。 * [[滝尾神社 (益子町)]] - 栃木県芳賀郡益子町大字七井鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (京都市)]] - 京都府京都市東山区本町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (西脇市)]] - 兵庫県西脇市黒田庄町黒田字宮ノ本鎮座。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:たきのおしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

* [[瀧尾神社 (八千代町)]] - 茨城県結城郡八千代町大字粟野鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市江曽島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市滝谷町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市平塚町鎮座。 * [[日光瀧尾神社]] - 栃木県鹿沼市口粟野鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)]]（今市瀧尾神社） - 栃木県日光市今市鎮座。今市総鎮守。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)]] - 栃木県日光市川俣鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)]] - 栃木県日光市木和田島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)]] - 栃木県日光市倉ケ崎鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)]] - 栃木県日光市小佐越鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)]] - 栃木県日光市小林鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)]] - 栃木県日光市瀬尾鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)]] - 栃木県日光市土呂部鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)]] - 栃木県日光市森友鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)]] - 栃木県日光市山口鎮座。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市山内鎮座。[[日光二荒山神社]]の別宮。[[女峰山]]の鎮守。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市[[男体山]]八合目鎮座。日光二荒山神社の境内社で、上記の分祠。 * [[滝尾神社 (益子町)]] - 栃木県芳賀郡益子町大字七井鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (京都市)]] - 京都府京都市東山区本町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (西脇市)]] - 兵庫県西脇市黒田庄町黒田字宮ノ本鎮座。

revision.text:
'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
{{aimai}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]]

revision.comment: added [[Category:Original pages]][[ja:瀧尾神社]] using [[Help:Gadget-HotCat|HotCat]]
revision.text:
'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
{{aimai}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Original pages]][[ja:瀧尾神社]]

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|ja|日光二荒山神社}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|ja|男体山}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

4 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:瀧尾神社 up to rev 94035004
revision.text:
'''瀧尾神社'''、'''滝尾神社'''（たきのおじんじゃ）とは、[[神社]]の名称。[[宗教法人]]としては全国に旧字体の瀧尾神社が13社、新字体の滝尾神社が4社、名称に瀧尾神社を含む神社が1社存在する。
* [[瀧尾神社 (八千代町)]] - 茨城県結城郡八千代町大字粟野鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市江曽島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市滝谷町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)]] - 栃木県宇都宮市平塚町鎮座。 * [[日光瀧尾神社]] - 栃木県鹿沼市口粟野鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)]]（今市瀧尾神社） - 栃木県日光市今市鎮座。今市総鎮守。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)]] - 栃木県日光市川俣鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)]] - 栃木県日光市木和田島鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)]] - 栃木県日光市倉ケ崎鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)]] - 栃木県日光市小佐越鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)]] - 栃木県日光市小林鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)]] - 栃木県日光市瀬尾鎮座。 * [[滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)]] - 栃木県日光市土呂部鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)]] - 栃木県日光市森友鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)]] - 栃木県日光市山口鎮座。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市山内鎮座。[[日光二荒山神社]]の別宮。[[女峰山]]の鎮守。 * 滝尾神社 - 栃木県日光市[[男体山]]八合目鎮座。日光二荒山神社の境内社で、上記の分祠。 * [[滝尾神社 (益子町)]] - 栃木県芳賀郡益子町大字七井鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (京都市)]] - 京都府京都市東山区本町鎮座。 * [[瀧尾神社 (西脇市)]] - 兵庫県西脇市黒田庄町黒田字宮ノ本鎮座。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:たきのおしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[瀧尾神社]] to [[Takio Shrine]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瀧尾神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q85882196]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine]], guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of [[:en:Mount Nantai|Mount Nantai]], Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瀧尾神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q85882196]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine]], guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of [[:en:Mount Nantai|Mount Nantai]], Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:瀧尾神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q85882196]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine]], guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of [[:en:Mount Nantai|Mount Nantai]], Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
{{disambiguation}}

Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of [[:en:Futarasan shrine|Nikkō Futarasan Shrine]], guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of [[:en:Mount Nantai|Mount Nantai]], Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

A detached shrine of {{ill|Futarasan shrine|en|Futarasan shrine|WD=Q701927|lt=Nikkō Futarasan Shrine}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|en|Mount Nantai|WD=Q1964765|lt=Mount Nantai}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

'''Taki-no-o Shrine''' (瀧尾神社, 滝尾神社) refers to Shinto shrines across Japan. As of now, there are 13 shrines registered under the old-style kanji 瀧尾神社, 4 under the new-style kanji 滝尾神社, and 1 shrine incorporating the name 瀧尾神社 in its title.
* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Futarasan shrine|en|Futarasan shrine|WD=Q701927|lt=Nikkō Futarasan Shrine}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|en|Mount Nantai|WD=Q1964765|lt=Mount Nantai}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.

* {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (八千代町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Yachiyo, Ibaraki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Awa, Yachiyo, Yūki District, Ibaraki Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市江曽島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Ezoshima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Ezoshima, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市滝谷町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Takidanicho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Takidanicho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja|瀧尾神社 (宇都宮市平塚町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Utsunomiya, Hiratsukacho)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Hiratsukacho, Utsunomiya City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja|日光瀧尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikkō Taki-no-o Shrine (Kanuma)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuchi Awa, Kanuma City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市今市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Imaichi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Imaichi Taki-no-o Shrine) - Located in Imaichi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. Main shrine of Imaichi. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市川俣)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kawamata)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kawamata, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市木和田島)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kiwadashima)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kiwadashima, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市倉ケ崎)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kuragasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuragasaki, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小佐越)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kosagoe)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kosagoe, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市小林)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Kobayashi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kobayashi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市瀬尾)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Seo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Seo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja|滝尾神社 (日光市土呂部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Torobu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Torobu, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市森友)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Moritomo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Moritomo, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja|瀧尾神社 (日光市山口)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Yamaguchi)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Yamaguchi, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Sannai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located in Sannai, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A detached shrine of {{ill|Futarasan shrine|en|Futarasan shrine|WD=Q701927|lt=Nikkō Futarasan Shrine|1=Futarasan shrine}}, guarding Mount Nyohō. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja|滝尾神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nikkō, Mount Nantai)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瀧尾神社|1=Takio Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q85882196}} - Located at the eighth station of {{ill|Mount Nantai|en|Mount Nantai|WD=Q1964765|lt=Mount Nantai|1=Mount Nantai}}, Nikkō City, Tochigi Prefecture. A sub-shrine of Nikkō Futarasan Shrine. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja|滝尾神社 (益子町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Mashiko)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Nanae, Mashiko, Haga District, Tochigi Prefecture. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|ja|瀧尾神社 (京都市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Kyoto)|qq=}} - Located in Honmachi, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto City. * {{ill|Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja|瀧尾神社 (西脇市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taki-no-o Shrine (Nishiwaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Kuroda, Nishiwaki City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
